narrative:
Concord Township has 909 registered voters, with 49.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.5 percentage points.
